form.title: Create Infrastructure Report
form.description: Complete the damage details, location, and photo evidence so the verification team can act quickly.

guidance.title: Before you submit
guidance.description: Use clear photos, precise coordinates, and a short factual description. Reports with complete evidence are easier to verify.

placeholders.title: Example: Pothole in front of the market
placeholders.address: Enter the nearest address or landmark

helpers.basicInfo: Tell us what happened and choose the most relevant infrastructure category.
helpers.address: Optional, but helpful when the location is near a landmark or unnamed road.
helpers.photo: Upload a clear photo to help verification.
helpers.location: Use GPS or manually select a point on the map.

messages.categoryLoadError: Categories could not be loaded. Try refreshing the page.
messages.categoryEmpty: No active categories are available yet.
messages.createError: Check your information and try submitting the report again.

summary.title: Submission checklist
summary.description: Review the essentials before sending your report for verification.

validation.photoRequired: At least one evidence photo is required.

locationPicker.title: Pin the report location
locationPicker.description: Use your device location or enter coordinates manually before submitting the report.
locationPicker.permissionDeniedDescription: Allow location access in your browser settings or enter latitude and longitude manually.
locationPicker.unsupportedDescription: This browser does not support geolocation. Enter coordinates manually instead.
locationPicker.locationUnavailableDescription: We could not detect your location. Try again or enter coordinates manually.

photoUploader.title: Upload evidence photos
photoUploader.description: Add clear photos of the damaged infrastructure before submitting your report.
photoUploader.label: Evidence photos
photoUploader.helper: Accepted formats: JPG, PNG, WebP, HEIC, or HEIF. Maximum size: {maxSize} MB per photo.
photoUploader.invalidTypeDescription: Only image files can be selected as evidence photos.
photoUploader.invalidSizeDescription: Each evidence photo must be {maxSize} MB or smaller.
photoUploader.selectionRequired: At least one evidence photo is required.

map.title: Public Report Map
map.description: View the distribution of verified infrastructure reports.
map.privateDataNotice: Reporter private data is not shown.

emptyStates.noPublicReports: No public reports for this filter.

validation.titleMinLength: Report title must be at least 8 characters.
validation.descriptionMinLength: Damage description must be at least 20 characters.
validation.photoRequired: At least one photo must be uploaded.
validation.evidencePhotoRequired: At least one uploaded evidence photo is required.
validation.mimeTypeInvalid: Photo must be JPG, PNG, WebP, HEIC, or HEIF.
validation.fileSizeInvalid: Each photo must be 5 MB or smaller.
validation.photoInvalid: Photo must be JPG, PNG, or WebP.
validation.rejectionNoteMinLength: Rejection note must be at least 5 characters.
validation.noteMaxLength: Note must be 500 characters or fewer.
